chunks.text: image.png You can see that this image is here. So this is image.png. And I put train image in alt. Now if I show it to you by previewing in the browser,

chunks.text: then see how it looks. This is our page and this train image is visible here. What happened by doing this? Where did the alt that we wrote go? You can say.

chunks.text: I will tell you where it went. What we put in the alt. So see what we put in the alt, we did not see it now. Assume for some reason

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: the server cannot show you the image. Then what will happen? I wrote image2 by mistake. Now there is no file named image2.png here. So what will be the error?

chunks.text: What will happen? I'll show you what will happen. So alt will be displayed here. And such an error image will be displayed. Which will tell that

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: whatever image you have put, put it properly. You have done something wrong. The URL of the server you have given there, this image is not there.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: then you can put alt in the image like this. If I don't put alt, then what will happen? If I don't put alt, then the alt text that was coming,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: it will not come. Nothing else will happen. So you don't want that when an error occurs in your server, the user sees this image.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You want something like this. The scenario should be made. The user should see something like this. Train image is written. See it like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I hope you understood this. So the image is completely straightforward. It has two more attributes, which are very important. One is width.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Which is width in pixels. If I do 23, width is equal to, then you can see. In fact, I will correct the image first.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I wrote image2 by mistake. Image.png is this. So here you can see I have taken 23 pixels, which is very small.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So I will make it 230 pixels. You don't need to write px in this. When we write width in CSS, we will see that we need to write px there.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Here we just write width is equal to number in double quotes. As you can see. So here if I bring it, then you see

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: that we have seen this small image width. If I also give its height, that is, I also give its height. I say if the height is also 230, then its aspect ratio will also go down.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So it will stretch a little. Because what did it do? It made its width 230 and made its height 230. As you can see.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now if you want its height to be 230 and the width to be automatically adjusted, then you just use the height attribute. Now remove the width one here.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So its height will be 230 pixels and the more it can go in width, the more it will go. It will be automatically adjusted. Now see,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: it was automatically adjusted in width and it took this in height. Now what happens is that width and height can be adjusted through CSS.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And we will see in the CSS section that why we should always set this width and height. We should always set one thing from width and height.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Such that when our page is loading, then the image inside our page should not come suddenly in the page. I will tell you

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: in the coming videos. But now you understand that these attributes of width and height, I have heard many people saying that they have been deprecated,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: they should not be used now. But I say they should be used for SEO purpose. Why should it be done? I will tell you in the coming videos

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: where I will tell you about Core Web Vitals and SEO. For now, you understand that width gives width to the image, height gives height to the image.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: If one of the two is applied, then the other one automatically gets set. And these values are in pixels and you don't have to write px or pixel.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You just have to write this number and that's it. This is an attribute, height and an src attribute, an alt attribute.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: In this, you can also use the style attribute. In fact, you can use the style attribute with almost all the tags. So this was about the image.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Now we will quickly talk about tables in HTML. In HTML, the table tag is very useful. I will tell you

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: what happens with the table tag. You get to see a table from the table tag. Now I copy this table from here and when I copy this table

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: from here, then you will see that my page will look something like this. So this is the HTML table.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Where did my preview page go? Here it is. Look at the name here, Harry Age 100. Now if I put

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: a lot more things here, let's say I put something like this here. Let's say I put the name and let's say I put

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: the designation here. Let's say I put the programmer's designation of Harry. And let's say

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I want to put more things. I will use the alt shift bottom arrow key. I will use the alt shift bottom arrow key.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And here let's say I want to write favorite language. And I want to write let's say

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: JavaScript. Okay. And now you will see that this table will be made like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Name, destination, favorite language. Okay. So what is this? How does it work?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I will tell you. So look here, we used the table tag. In the table tag, there is a tr tag,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: which is the table row. What will come in this row? You will get to see this. Now if you want to use this as a table heading,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: you say that this is my table row, that is, this row is this row, in which name,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: destination, and your favorite language is written. What will come in this row? And what will come

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: and what will happen? Here you can see that there will be a heading. So that's why I will use th.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Th means table heading. And we will write it only once. So in the first tr, we will write th.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: Once we put the heading on top, then after that we will put the data. So we will put td in the table row,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: which stands for table data. And here all the rows you put will be added.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So here let's say I write sam and this is also a programmer.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And let's say this is Java, its favorite language. So these rows will be added under the table.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You can see here that these rows are being added. With CSS, we will see

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: how it can be given a border, it can be styled. But this default looks like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And yes, I know this is ugly, but you guys just understand that the table

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: works like this. Now there are row span and row span means how many rows

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: will be spanned by your td. For example, let's say I write here I want that

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: sam and programmer were taking one cell at first. Sam was taking one cell and programmer was

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: taking one cell. I want to write sam in two cells. So I don't want to write programmer,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I just want to write sam. And I want to write here that call span is equal to

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: two. So call span is equal to two means that sam will now take the

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: place of two columns. What does it mean? It will look like this. Let me show you. Something like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So it has taken the place of this whole column. So the call span means how many

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: columns will be spanned. By default, only one column will be spanned,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: one cell. But sometimes one cell, two columns will be spanned.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: To demonstrate this thing, I explain to you from excel. In excel,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: you understand that this is a table of our html. Sometimes I would like to

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: span two columns vertically. Suppose I want to merge these two cells.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: There we use row span. And with whom will we use row span?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: We will use row span with td obviously. So with td, we were using

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: call span and row span. If we use row span, it will span

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: two rows like this. So I hope you understood this thing. And when we

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: make tables and projects with html, then you will understand better.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: After this, I will write another tr here. So you will see that my

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: table looks like this. Now to better explain this, I will put a

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: css style here. What I will do here is I will add a stylesheet and

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I will name this stylesheet style.css. So in style.css, and you don't

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: need to understand css at all. I will already tell you. I will write

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: border 2px solid black in td. And I will write here

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: that this row will have Harry, programmer and javascript. Then I said

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: that this sam, its row span will be how much? Where did I

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: give 2 rows? First I said that my java will have 2 rows.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So how many rows will java take? Obviously it will take 2.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So here java will take 2 rows. So here you can see that java took 2 rows.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So when java took 2 rows, it means that I took 2 rows. I took 2 rows.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: So what happened by doing this? You can see that this was harry, programmer,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: javascript. Then I said that this sam, its call span will be 2.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: That means it will take 2 columns. This sam will also take 2 columns. And this java

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: will take 2 rows. So you can see that exactly the same thing happened here.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: It took 2 rows. It took 2 columns. So in this way, row span and call span

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: can be used in html. So I will show you that if we use caption in table,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: student details, or I will say employee details. So your page will look like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: You can see here that the employee details caption will be added here. Now with css,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: it can also be changed. Its font, its font size. But for now, by default,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: it looks like this. The caption comes up. You will see employee details

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: like this. Along with that, you can also give header and footer. You can give

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: t-head and t-foot here. If I put header here and if I put footer here,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: then you can see t-head and t-foot like this. You can see header and footer

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: here. Now I will tell you about another tag which is called br tag which adds

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: add footer below. I will not add here. So I will add

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: footer here. Now I can group my header and footer content like this

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: with t-head and t-foot. So what will be the header of my table?

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: I can group this. I can put it in t-head. Along with that,

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: the content in the table will come in t-body. So what will

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: come in t-body? My table content will come like this. You can see

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: and after this, if I write t-foot here and I want to document

chunks.text: the format, then it will be a better format. Assume that

chunks.text: So this is just a way to group. I have put some trs in

chunks.text: t-foot, I have put my main body in t-body and I have

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: And obviously nothing will change from here. What is the

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: benefit of doing this? We have just done grouping so that we

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: can target more than CSS. So you will use this

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: very less, but you can do grouping like this.

chunks.text: Your whole table, head content will come here, foot content

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: will come here and body content comes in between head and

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: List is very important in HTML because we will use

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: list a lot. There are three types of list in HTML. One is

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: ordered list, one is unordered list and one is definition list.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: The most used one is unordered and ordered list. Let's see

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: unordered list first. Whenever we want to have unordered

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: data, and after this I can write Shubham. So here

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML
chunks.text: when I will write Harry Rohan Shubham, then when I will do ul, it will come like this.

chunks.title: Image, Lists, and Tables in HTML

chunks.text: make its opening closing tag ol and keep the rest the same,

chunks.text: you can also do roman numbers. You can also do it with the help of CSS.

chunks.text: And you can change it with CSS. It is very less used.
